title: livyathan #3882
definition:
1) leviathan, sea monster, dragon
    1a) large aquatic animal
    1b) perhaps the extinct dinosaur, plesiosaurus, exact meaning unknown
 ++++
 Some think this to be a crocodile but from the description in
 \\#Job 41:1-34\\ this is patently absurd. It appears to ba a large fire
 breathing animal of some sort. Just as the bomardier beetle has an
 explosion producing mechanism, so the great sea dragon may have an
 explosive producing mechanism to enable it to be a real fire breathing
 dragon.
